## Contribution Checklist
- [ ] **ECA:** I have signed the [Eclipse Contributor Agreement](http://www.eclipse.org/legal/ECA.php).
- [ ] **DCO:** All my commits are signed with Signed-off-by (git commit -s).
- [ ] **Conventional Commits:** I followed the [Conventional Commits](https://github.com/conventional-changelog/commitlint/tree/master/%40commitlint/config-conventional) pattern.
- [ ] **Tests:** I have added/updated unit and integration tests.
- [ ] **Documentation:** I have updated the relevant .adoc files.
- [ ] **Verification:** I have run mvn clean verify and it passed successfully.
